Name: library.degree
Role: Maximum degree of polynomial monomials in the SINDy library

Name: library.include_bias
Role: Include a constant term (1) in the library

Name: library.include_mm
Role: Include Michaelis-Menten terms x_i/(K+x_j) in the library

Name: sparse_prior.type
Role: Type of sparse prior: horseshoe (Finnish regularized horseshoe) or spike_and_slab (grouped spike-and-slab with MixtureGeneral)

Name: sparse_prior.tau0
Role: Global scale of the HalfCauchy prior on tau (horseshoe) -- controls the overall sparsity level

Name: sparse_prior.slab_scale
Role: Slab scale for the regularized horseshoe (Piironen & Vehtari). None = standard horseshoe, >0 = regularized

Name: sparse_prior.degree_penalty
Role: Exponent p for degree-dependent penalty: lambda_k ~ HalfCauchy(1/d^p). YAML boolean mapped to 1.0 (true) or 0.0 (false)

Name: sparse_prior.spike_sd
Role: Standard deviation of the spike component (near-zero coefficients)

Name: sparse_prior.slab_sd
Role: Standard deviation of the slab component (non-zero coefficients)

Name: sparse_prior.theta_a
Role: Alpha parameter for the Beta prior on per-feature mixing weight theta_k

Name: sparse_prior.theta_b
Role: Beta parameter for the Beta prior on per-feature mixing weight theta_k

Name: mcmc.num_warmup
Role: Number of warmup (adaptation) iterations per MCMC chain

Name: mcmc.num_samples
Role: Number of posterior samples per chain after warmup

Name: mcmc.num_chains
Role: Number of parallel MCMC chains

Name: mcmc.thinning
Role: Thinning factor for chains (keep 1-out-of-N)
Location: YAML mcmc > fit_runner.py L54 / refit_runner.py L218

Name: mcmc.target_accept
Role: Target acceptance probability for NUTS (step size adaptation)
Location: YAML mcmc > fit_runner.py L69 / refit_runner.py L228

Name: mcmc.max_treedepth
Role: Maximum NUTS tree depth (2^d leapfrog steps max)
Location: YAML mcmc > fit_runner.py L70 / refit_runner.py L229

Name: integrator.shooting
Role: Shooting method: single (direct integration) or multiple (latent z per segment)

Name: integrator.segments
Role: Number of segments for multiple shooting (None = one z per observation time point)

Name: integrator.rtol
Role: Relative tolerance for the adaptive PIDController

Name: integrator.atol
Role: Absolute tolerance for the adaptive PIDController

Name: integrator.max_steps
Role: Maximum number of ODE solver steps per integration. None = max(256*(T-1); 4096)

Name: shooting_scale
Role: Standard deviation of the continuity constraint Normal(0; shooting_scale) between segments

Name: model.segments
Role: Number of segments when invalid input (0 or negative)

Name: selection.strategy
Role: Selection strategy: {method}_{aggregation}. Methods: ci_nonzero; median; mean; prob_nonzero; kappa; one_minus_kappa; lambda; incl_prob. Aggregation: global; and; or. incl_prob is specific to spike-and-slab prior

Name: selection.threshold
Role: Selection threshold (meaning depends on method): ci_nonzero=min CI strength; median/mean=min |val|; prob_nonzero=min directional prob; kappa=max E[kappa]; etc.

Name: selection.hyperparameter
Role: Strategy-specific hyperparameter. For ci_nonzero: credible interval level (e.g. 0.95 = 95% CI)

Name: init.strategy
Role: Initialization strategy: regression (frequentist multi-start) or median (NumPyro init_to_median)

Name: observations.noise_fraction
Role: Fraction of the per-species max used as observation noise standard deviation

Name: observations.replicates
Role: Number of biological replicates per observation time point

Name: time.T
Role: Number of time points for simulation and observations
